title: GDK: gdk_bbp.c:2257: BBPfree: Assertion `b->P->sharecnt == 0' failed
poc: create table tofsims_naive_direct (x int, y int, val int);
select min(vcnt), max(vcnt), avg(vcnt) from tofsims_naive_direct_valuecount;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure on share count during free operation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tofsims_naive_direct (x INT, y INT, val INT CHECK (val >= 0));
INSERT INTO tofsims_naive_direct (x, y, val) VALUES (1, 2, 3);
INSERT INTO tofsims_naive_direct (x, y, val) VALUES (NULL, 5, 10);
SELECT MIN(val), MAX(val), AVG(val) FROM tofsims_naive_direct WHERE x IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE tofsims_naive_direct_valuecount AS SELECT x, COUNT(val) AS vcnt FROM tofsims_naive_direct GROUP BY x;
